name: data-warehouse-analytics-metric-aggregation-engine
description: T174 MetricAggregationEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Aggregates metrics within time windows. All aggregations are tenant-scoped. Emits MetricAggregated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: tenant-scoped aggregations, time-window boundaries, MetricAggregated emission, no cross-tenant metric leakage
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + time-window-aggregation + tenant-scoped-metrics + metric-aggregation patterns for T174
Break T174 into: consume warehouse.event.normalised → extract metric fields → apply time-window bucketing → aggregate within tenant scope → storeDocument(aggregatedMetric) → emit MetricAggregated

Generate metric-aggregation-engine.service.ts — @EventPattern('warehouse.event.normalised'), extracts tenantId from ALS, aggregates metrics within configured time windows, groups by metric type and window boundary. All aggregation records include tenantId. DNA-8: storeDocument(aggregatedMetric) BEFORE emitting MetricAggregated.
Named check validation: tenant_scoped_aggregations, time_window_bucketing, metric_aggregated_emitted, store_before_emit, no_cross_tenant_leakage
Score generated code 0-100 against T174 iron rules: tenant isolation, time-window logic, DNA-8 compliance, MetricAggregated emission
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=tenant-scoped-time-window+store-before-emit, rejected=cross-tenant-aggregation OR emit-before-store OR no-time-window-bucketing. curriculumTier=1.
